name: fade
title: Fade
description: Scroll-edge fade wrapper — masks overflow content so gradients and textured surfaces show through.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

side.description: Edge where content fades as it approaches the scroll boundary.

size.description: Fade depth along the fade axis. Use dimension size token names or a CSS length.

visible.description: Controls the mask without removing the scroll container from layout.
